top_signals.title: Trump administration: Iran deal signing likely in coming days, but not '100%' certain
top_signals.summary: A deal to end the Iran war could be signed soon, a senior Trump administration official said, following recent conflicting statements from the warring nations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
